text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Goodness, you'd like me to perform<n>on stage?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm organizing an opera show, you<n>see, for the
upcoming children's fan<n>event.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I would like you to play the<n>supporting role of
the princess.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The princess? How lovely. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any experience in<n>theater, though. Is
that all right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My eyes do not deceive me. You<n>exude elegance
with your delicate<n>temperament. To a child, you
would<n>appear the quintessential princess.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Besides, with me as the script writer,<n>director, and
leading actor, the<n>opera's overwhelming success
is all<n>but guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aah, what a fortunate and blessed<n>being you are
to have been chosen<n>by the Overlord to make your
operatic<n>debut as a heroine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...And that's what she said when she<n>invited me
for the role. I was thinking<n>of taking up the
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why not? It's a good idea. Having<n>more
experience on stage would<n>benefit you in your
winning concerts<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll come watch. I can help you<n>rehearse your lines
if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Would you really? I could tackle<n>anything with you
at my side, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to practice hard so I can<n>bring smiles to
all the children. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I walk past the outdoor<n>stage and see
some kind of show<n>being held for families who
live<n>around the neighborhood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Grandmother! Never would I have<n>believed you
were a witch. ♪

text_block_list.name: Witch
text_block_list.text:
Pesky princess! A curse on you I<n>shall cast! ♪
Sleep now, and slumber<n>forevermore! ♪

text_block_list.name: Witch
text_block_list.text: Take this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh dearie me. My body feels so<n>weak, and I'm
so... very... sleepy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Goood... niiight... Zzzz... Zzzz... ♪

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Princess, wake up! The witch is so<n>mean!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aah! I have come too late. ♪ Princess!<n>What has
befallen you?! I will not let<n>this act go unpunished!
♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I recall the day when we both met!<n>'Twas when I
had just gained<n>awareness of the world 'round
me. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Since I was a child, I've always been<n>a beautiful,
handsome prince! And I<n>stole the eyes of every
lady in the<n>palace. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Opera O's lines are so long. But the<n>kids seem
really into it, so I guess<n>that's good.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Bright's doing fantastic up there too.<n>She doesn't
seem nervous at all. She<n>might be a natural at
this.)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And now, I will smite the evil witch<n>and bring
peace back to the world! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Young friends! In order to awaken the<n>princess, I
require your help! Lend me<n>your voices! All at
once now! Let us<n>wake the princess!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Princeeeess... Wake uuup...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The kids seem a little shy. I guess it<n>does take a
lot of courage to yell out<n>loud all of a sudden...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Not that it matters. Bright should open<n>her eyes
soon, and then the story will<n>end happily ever...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Um... Wait a minute. This wasn't in<n>the script.
What's Bright doing?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Is she actually asleep?! You havegot to be kidding... This is bad!)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Proud friends! Tiny heroes! Is that all<n>the power
you've got?! Come now!<n>Show the princess what
you're truly<n>made of!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Princess! Please! You have to wake<n>up!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's the spirit! The fate of the<n>princess
depends on the power of<n>your voices!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
We have to try harder! Princeeesss!<n>Waaake
uuup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by T.M. Opera O, more<n>children begin
to join in and start<n>yelling, until...

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: PRINCEEEESS!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn. That was a nice nap.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! The princess woke up!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Young heroes! The power<n>within each and
every one of you has<n>awoken the princess from
her deep<n>slumber!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: We did it! We did it! Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The children smile and cheer together,<n>feeling a
deep sense of unity thanks<n>to the show, and the
opera finishes<n>on a high note.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you actually fell asleep<n>on stage... I
was so scared the show<n>would be ruined.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I accidentally stayed up too<n>late reviewing
the script yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, Bright... Only you could still make<n>it work out
somehow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What a brilliant performance that was!<n>What a
marvelous eye I have for<n>talent, to have found
such a diamond<n>in the rough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! ♪ It's really an honor to receive<n>so much
praise.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I particularly loved how you<n>improvised toward the
end and<n>ignored the children's cries in order<n>to
draw them further into the<n>performance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You breathed life into the stage,<n>resulting in an
outstanding finale!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've decided! Bright, you must be a<n>part of the
next work I perform at my<n>family's residence!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Are you offering me another<n>role? If you'll
have me, I would love<n>to come. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O continues to shower<n>Mejiro Bright in
praise, unaware that<n>her artistic choice was
nothing more<n>than a timely blunder.
